description: Gradual memory leak in user-service caused by unreleased database connections in the session handler. Memory climbs from ~45% to 98% over 40 minutes, causing GC thrashing, increased latency, and eventual OOM kills.
expected_root_cause: Memory leak in connection pool — connections not released after timeout
